title: Luffy Learns the Crisis
description: Pages 11–15 focus on luffy learns the crisis, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as doflamingo, Law, Luffy, and the Sunny team are pulled into separate crises as Dressrosa's power structure tightens.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Please save me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Huh?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I mustn't be captured by big mom!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I once... Tricked her in order to acquire research funds.....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You did what!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Well... never mind the details...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: But anyway, if they catch me, I'll be exposed as a liar and killed for sure...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: As if I care about your shitty life!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: But there's no way we're handing you over!! So just shut up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: They're getting ready to fire on us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: WaH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: KyaHHHHHH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Shit! And at a time like this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: We need to get far away from Dressrosa!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: think we can lose 'em!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Is everyone alright!!? Sanji!! But wait, hey...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Don't draw the yonkou any closer to this country!! The citizens would all panic...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: And our soldiers' battle plans would be thrown into chaos!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Hmmm!!? Hold on, why is Caesar on the ship!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Seems like the deal failed!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Law wouldn't be in such a pinch if everything had gone as planned!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Law told us to bring Caesar to the next island, so that's why we've got him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Sanji-Kun!! I don't think we should return!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: But I'm not saying that because I'm afraid!! Listen, Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: There are now three "cards" that we're struggling against Dofla- Mingo for!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Casaar, the smile factory, and for some reason, Momo- suke.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: The smile factory hasn't yet been destroyed, so that one's still his, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: We've got the other two cards here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Law's fight with Doflamingo was a mere decoy, so that we could get these cards far away from him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: And I suspect that he was also fighting in order to buy time for destroying the factory!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: ...tora-man went that far to protect these cards!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: If we act in a way that would deliver them right into the enemy's hand....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: ...that would be no way to repay his efforts!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: ...that's right. Got it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: We're Defi- Nitely Gonna...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Steal Back Tora- Man!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: What's the next island, again?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: It is Zou, that it is!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: SANJ!!! Nami!! Chopper!! Brook!! MOMO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: ...well if that's how it is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Keep on heading for you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Under- stood, Captain!! Alright...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: I just need per- mission for one thing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: Allow me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: to fire back at big mom's ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: Ah, sure thing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: We've already picked that fight!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: Heh heh, you bet it is!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: That's way too danger- Ous!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: Stop it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: See you guys later, then!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: We'll be waiting at you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #54
dialogue.text: Leave the destruction of that factory to us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #55
dialogue.text: Uohhh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #56
dialogue.text: Okay!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #57
dialogue.text: Stay safe, everyone!!!

summary: Luffy Learns the Crisis focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as doflamingo, Law, Luffy, and the Sunny team are pulled into separate crises as Dressrosa's power structure tightens.
